title: Introduction and Research Context
objective: Establish the review's motivation, scope, and the specific problem space of automated literature review systems.

title: Methodological Approaches
objective: Categorize and analyze technical approaches, focusing on Virtual Reality Experiment, Randomized Complete Block Design; Random parameter logit model (mixed logit); binary_logistic_regression.

title: Task Scope and System Capabilities
objective: Examine the range of tasks addressed, including Pedestrian crossing behavior at virtual crosswalk; Feature preference assessment; predict probability of pedestrians' red-light running behavior at intersections, and how system capabilities vary across them.

title: Claim Synthesis and Cross-Paper Comparability
objective: Synthesize specific claims from the evidence matrix, assess where papers converge or conflict, and evaluate metric standardization.

title: Research Gaps and Opportunities
objective: Present 2 verified gaps and explain what evidence substantiates each.

title: Discussion: Synthesis and Future Directions
objective: Synthesize findings and prioritize important open problems for future research.

title: Conclusion
objective: Summarize key comparative findings, gap priorities, and the contribution of this review to the field.
